title: lyrics.json — timed lyrics with confidence and honesty flags
description: Produced either by aligning a supplied lyrics file to the audio (mode 'aligned') or by transcribing the isolated vocal stem with Whisper (mode 'transcribed'). Uncertainty is explicit: per-word confidence, per-line flags, and untranscribed_regions listing sung passages the system could not read. Consumers must treat flagged content as suspect rather than assume completeness.

mode.description: aligned: text is the supplied lyrics file (display truth), timing from Whisper anchoring. transcribed: text AND timing from Whisper on the vocal stem — expect errors on effects-heavy or non-lexical vocals.

engine.description: What produced the timing (and, in transcribed mode, the text). Config-derived, hence deterministic — not run metadata.

language_source.description: Provenance of `language`: 'pinned' from config, or 'detected_vocal_window' — detected on a window assembled from the earliest vocal_activity regions (the whole file head when no regions exist), so detection never runs on a silent stem head (review 007 field finding 1; added in 1.1.0).

lines.description: Sorted by start_seconds. In aligned mode, lines mirror the supplied file's line breaks; in transcribed mode, lines are Whisper segments.

flags.description: low_confidence: mean word confidence below threshold (config, default 0.5). possibly_non_lexical: hallucination heuristics fired (no_speech_prob / compression_ratio / dictionary hit rate) — text may be invented. overlapping_vocals: sustained dense vocal-stem energy suggests harmonies; words may be merged. long_word_duration: a word exceeds ~2.5 s (melisma); timings smeared. unaligned (aligned mode): line found no transcript anchor; timing absent-quality, taken from lrc hint or neighbor interpolation. timing_interpolated: word times inferred from neighbors rather than observed. outside_vocal_activity: the line's span overlaps no vocal-activity region — likely hallucinated over instrumental audio; flagged, never dropped (added in 1.1.0).

words.description: Sorted, monotone, within the line span. May be empty for an 'unaligned' line.

confidence.description: transcribed mode: Whisper word probability. aligned mode: token match score between supplied word and transcript anchor.

supplied_markup.description: Present in aligned mode when the supplied lyrics file contained section-header lines like '[Verse 1]' or '[Chorus]'. Header lines are excluded from lines[] and from coverage math (they are not sung); they are recorded here and feed structure.json section labeling as 'supplied_markup' evidence. Sorted by source_line_index.

label.description: Normalized section label when recognizable; 'other' for headers that don't map to the structure vocabulary.

source_line_index.description: 0-based line number in the supplied lyrics file.

hint_seconds.description: Present when the file is .lrc and the header line carried a timestamp.

untranscribed_regions.description: Uncovered spans of vocal activity: the word-covered intervals are subtracted from the vocal-activity regions (audio_features.json), and remaining spans at least `uncovered_min_seconds` long (config, default 1.0) are emitted. Sharper than the 1.0.0 region-granularity definition, which hid partial misses inside partially-covered regions (review 007 field finding 3; sharpened in 1.1.0 — same shape). The honesty ledger: an LLM consumer should say 'vocals here, content unknown', never pretend silence.

vocal_activity_covered_ratio.description: Fraction of total vocal-activity time overlapped by at least one word.

lines_flagged_ratio.description: Fraction of lines carrying any flag. A quick trust score for the whole document.
